metadata.status: capabilities-implemented; cases and oracle wiring pending
metadata.note: Template only. NOT run by default and NOT a validated manifest. The 10 P2 capability modules are implemented and unit-tested, but P2 cases/fixtures and oracle/metrics wiring into the runner are not built yet. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-02-p2-scaffolding-design.md and range_src/enterprise_agent_range/p2/.
